revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{pp-protected|reason=Persistent [[WP:Disruptive editing|disruptive editing]]|small=yes}}{{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} ==Usage== This should be placed on the category page that you wish to be hidden. It includes the __HIDDENCAT__ [[Help:Magic words|magic word]], so that does not need to be added to pages that already have the {{tlx|hidden category}} template. Criteria are given at {{section link|Wikipedia:Categorization|Hiding categories}} and [[:Category:Hidden categories]]. ==TemplateData== {{TemplateData header}} { "params": {}, "description": "This template should be placed on the category page that you wish to be hidden. No parameters are required." } ==See also== *{{section link|Wikipedia:Categorization|Wikipedia administrative categories}} *Archived discussion at {{section link|Wikipedia:Village pump (technical)/Archive 24|HIDDENCAT}} {{Other category-header templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Tracking templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hidden_category%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
